creator: fritz.heinrichmeyer@fernuni-hagen.de
text:
today i tried to make a crashdump for debugging, but i used
unfortunately the same kernel in single user mode to save the image. I
followed the advices in the handbook and typed

fsck -p

in single user mode. After checking the root fs it rebooted immediately.
Now the server has to do its work again, no change for debugging so far
...

The crash came after 40 minutes uptime when trying to read email with
the uw-imap daemon.

Greetings
-- 
Fritz Heinrichmeyer mailto:fritz.heinrichmeyer@fernuni-hagen.de
